ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123456 has been placed
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order has been successfully placed and is now being processed.

Order Details:
  • Order ID: 123456
  • Items: 2x Wireless Mouse, 1x USB-C Hub
  • Total Paid: ₹4,560.00 (incl. GST)
  • Payment Method: Amazon Pay Wallet
  • Estimated Delivery: 18–20 Oct 2026

You can track your shipment here: <URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email or visit your Order History page.

Thank you for choosing Amazon. Happy shopping!

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Income Tax Department: Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

This is an important notification from the Income Tax Department regarding your pending refund for the financial year 2024-25. Our records indicate that your refund of ₹45,000 has been held for the past 90 days due to incomplete verification.

To expedite the release of your refund, please verify your personal and banking details by clicking the secure link below:

  <URL>

Failure to complete this verification within 7 days may result in the cancellation of your refund claim. For your convenience, the link will automatically log you into the Income Tax Department portal using your PAN and Aadhaar credentials.

If you do not complete the verification, your refund will be permanently forfeited. For any assistance, contact the ITD toll-free line at 1800-240-0100.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Regards,

Income Tax Department
(Official Communication – Do not reply to this email)
